description_long: This obelisk features a tall, cylindrical central column with a striking blue and black spiral pattern, topped by a gold, angular crown-like structure. Around the central shaft, multiple protruding platforms or pods are arranged in a helical pattern, giving the structure a futuristic and dynamic appearance. At the base, four large, semi-transparent geodesic domes with a triangular grid pattern cluster symmetrically, each with a small entrance. A circular clock or medallion is mounted near the top of the column, adding a functional or decorative element. The entire structure sits on a flat, dark square platform, providing stability and contrast. The design combines modern architectural motifs with geometric and metallic accents, making it a prominent urban landmark.
description: A tall, spiraled blue and black obelisk with gold crown tip, surrounded by four geodesic domes and multiple protruding pods, set on a dark square base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central column with spiral pods, gold crown tip, visible clock/medallion, and three geodesic domes clearly in the foreground.
description_view_1: This view highlights the clock/medallion on the column, with the gold crown tip and all four geodesic domes visible, showing more of the right side pods.
description_view_2: The back view reveals the spiral pods on the left side of the column, with the gold crown tip and the domes mostly visible but entrances less prominent.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the left side spiral pods and the gold crown tip, with the geodesic domes forming a semi-circle around the base.
attribute_inscription: A circular clock or medallion is mounted near the top of the column, but no visible text or inscription is present.
attribute_ornamentation: The obelisk is highly ornamented with spiral pods along the shaft, a gold crown tip, and a decorative clock/medallion. The geodesic domes at the base add geometric embellishment.
attribute_base_design: The base consists of four large, semi-transparent geodesic domes with a triangular grid pattern, symmetrically arranged on a flat, dark square platform. Each dome has a small entrance.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is adorned with a gold, angular crown-like structure, giving a regal and modern finish to the obelisk.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is immediately surrounded by four geodesic domes and sits on a flat, dark square platform. No additional features such as fences, statues, or vegetation are visible.
